title: Purple Pearls
description: To actually match with the endermen they drop from!
body:
![The project's banner.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3TvVen4y/images/2fd189961864463349cfefc70e350703a424a893.png)

You know, endermen have purple eyes and The End is mostly just purple. It only makes sense for ender pearls to be purple!
